data.text: M06/P03 ANOTHER FELISIAN WORLD. AT 356.62 WITH A HILLSIDE LANDING
AMONG TREES THERE WERE GORGES TO THE EAST AND WEST, WITH A NOTABLE
PEAK TO THE ENE AT A DISTANCE; ARRIVING AT THE PEAK, WHICH WAS
NOTHING UNUSUAL, IT WAS NOTED THAT IN THE FLAT TO THESOUTH (DUE SOUTH
OF THE LANDING AREA) AMID A NEST OF PONDS, THERE WAS ANOTHER OBJECT
WHICH WAS ONLY A LARGE ANGULAR GRASS COVERED LITHIC. 356.63 PROVED
TO BBE A WET LANDING IN A CHANNEL BETWEEN A LARGE ISLAND A TALL
MOUNTAIN PEAK ISLAND; BOTH ISLANDS HAVE TREES AND SMALL BUSHES. 2.58
ALSO HAS A NUMBER OF PONDS, INCLUDING ONE LARGE ONE; THESE POND AREAS
SEEM TO BE A FEATURE OF THIS WORLD; A VERY PLAYFUL HOPPER 'HELPED'
HERE. 17.58 HAD LARGE PINNACLES, ALSO IN A POND COVERED ROLLING
AREA WITH BUSHES AND TREES; ALSO 'DISCOVERED' (BY GRAVITY ASSIST)
WAS A GORGE LOCATED NEAR 35.-35. PRO 0.110.520 PRV 0.002.953.859
